Ontology Tool Skill (x-ipe-tool-ontology)
features.description: Complete x-ipe-tool-ontology skill with 3 operations: (A) Knowledge Tagging — AI-driven content analysis, dynamic dimension discovery, KnowledgeNode/KnowledgeDimension entity model, dimension registry normalization; (B) Graph Creation — collect entities, build graph, detect disconnected clusters, auto-split JSONL, stale reference pruning; (C) Knowledge Search — text matching + BFS traversal, multi-graph cross-search, configurable depth
